betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Interface§f:
The §6ME Interface §f(appliedenergistics2:interface) is the §eexternal inventory bridge§f of AE2. It connects the ME network to adjacent chests, machines, and processing blocks. It hosts up to §b9 internal slots§f for items, holds §bpatterns in a pattern slot§f, and pushes or pulls items based on redstone configuration.

§6Production Path (network/blocks/interfaces_interface.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / c d / aba" with the following key ingredients:
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot§f (ingotIron) — 4 in the corners
- §bb§f: §6Glass§f (vanilla) at the middle of left and right columns
- §cc§f: §6Annihilation Core§f (appliedenergistics2:material:44) at the middle of the left column
- §cd§f: §6Formation Core§f (appliedenergistics2:material:43) at the center
- Yields 1× ME Interface

§6Function§f:
- §bItem push§f: insert items from the network into an adjacent inventory
- §bItem pull§f: extract items from an adjacent inventory into the network
- §bInternal buffer§f: 9 slots hold items briefly while transferring
- §bPattern provider§f: configure §6processing patterns§f to automate the Interface
- §bRedstone control§f: behaviour toggled via redstone signal
- §bCrafting requester§f: the Interface can act as a §6crafting anchor§f — place an §6ME Pattern Terminal§f on it to start autocrafting jobs

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 24 items that the ME Interface is a component of, including:
- §6ME Storage Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:220)
- §6ME Import Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:240) — uses Annihilation Core
- §6ME Export Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:260) — uses Formation Core
- §6ME Fluid Interface§f (appliedenergistics2:part:441) — the fluid-specific variant
- §6Pattern Expansion Card§f (appliedenergistics2:material:58)
- §6ME Wireless Access Point§f (built using ME Interface as a core component)
- §6Crafting CPU§f components

§6Interface Placement (BlockInterface.java:45-105)§f:
- Place an ME Interface on any face of a §6ME Cable§f (including dense cables)
- The §6OMNIDIRECTIONAL§f blockstate property toggles whether the Interface connects to all six faces (default) or only one
- §6Sneak-right-click§f to rotate, §6right-click§f to open the §6Interface GUI§f
- §eTip§f: pair an ME Interface with an §6ME Pattern Terminal§f to begin §6autocrafting§f — see the §6Crafting CPU§f quest

§6Compatibility Notes§f:
- §6Fluid Interface§f (30180) uses the same recipe shape, swapping glass for a §6Lapis Dust§f cluster
- §eTip§f: the ME Interface's 9 internal slots also work as a tiny §6buffer§f, useful when feeding a furnace that can't accept full stacks
- §cWarning§f: external machines that need a constant redstone signal will fight the Interface's redstone control; gate them with a §6Toggle Bus§f or §6Level Emitter§f
